title: Senior Doctor - CMC Vellore - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - CMC Vellore - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
